name: Cold Melon Soup
recipeInstructions:
Note: Melons should be RIPE.
Finely chop 1 1/2 cups each of cantaloupe and honeydew melons. Set aside.
Place the remaining coarsely chopped melons in a blender with orange juice, lime juice and honey. Blend until smooth. Pour into a large bowl. Stir in champagne and the reserved melon. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
Pour into iced bowls. Whip cream and use as garnish with fresh mint leaves. Makes 6 to 8 servings
